narrative: An AI Engineer with five years at Mad Street Den, a product‑focused startup, brings hands‑on work with Elasticsearch, BM25, LoRA, pgvector and vector stores such as Weaviate and Qdrant—directly relevant to the search and retrieval focus of the role. The primary driver of the #33 ranking is the below‑average JD‑relevant skill match, compounded by minor credibility concerns flagged in the profile. Experience level aligns with the lower end of the 5‑9‑year target, but the candidate is based in Bhubaneswar, which reduces availability and location fit for the Pune/Noida office. A key limitation is the uncertain notice period and the geographic mismatch.
